check_content_excerpt:
Verify that RHEL 9 contains no duplicate GIDs for interactive users with the following command:
 
 $  cut -d : -f 3 /etc/group | uniq -d
 
If the system has duplicate GIDs, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Edit the file "/etc/group" and provide each group that has a duplicate GID with a unique GID.
title: RHEL 9 groups must have unique Group ID (GID).
